description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by dense greenery and a perimeter wall, featuring a flat, modern roof with clean lines. The front entrance is set back behind a paved driveway and a low wall, with a small gate providing access. Large windows are visible on the sides and rear, allowing for ample natural light, while the front facade is more enclosed for privacy. The property includes a backyard area with a swimming pool partially visible through the trees. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a mix of stone, concrete, and wood materials, and the landscaping is lush and well-maintained. The overall design is contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by lush greenery and a perimeter wall, featuring large windows and a private backyard with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, low wall, and dense landscaping around the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, extensive greenery, and the length of the perimeter wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, backyard greenery, and partial visibility of the pool area.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the integration of the house with the surrounding trees and the open backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
